nodes.label: ECSS-E-ST-40C §3.1
nodes.title: Safety critical software [SHALL] comply with the verification

nodes.label: ECSS-E-ST-40C §2.1
nodes.title: The supplier [SHALL] perform unit testing on all software mod

nodes.label: ECSS-E-ST-40C §2.2
nodes.title: The unit test plan [SHOULD] be reviewed by the quality assura

nodes.label: ECSS-E-ST-40C §2.3
nodes.title: The supplier [MAY] use automated testing tools.

nodes.label: 1 The supplier [SHALL] perform unit testing on all software modules before integration.
nodes.full_text: 1 The supplier [SHALL] perform unit testing on all software modules before integration.

nodes.label: 2 The unit test plan [SHOULD] be reviewed by the quality assurance board.
nodes.full_text: 2 The unit test plan [SHOULD] be reviewed by the quality assurance board.

nodes.label: 3 The supplier [MAY] use automated testing tools.
nodes.full_text: 3 The supplier [MAY] use automated testing tools.

nodes.label: 1 Safety critical software [SHALL] comply with the verification guidelines in ECSS-Q-ST-80C.
nodes.full_text: 1 Safety critical software [SHALL] comply with the verification guidelines in ECSS-Q-ST-80C.

nodes.label: ECSS-Q-ST-80C §2.2
nodes.title: The QA team [SHOULD] conduct audits every milestone.

nodes.label: ECSS-Q-ST-80C §2.1
nodes.title: All test results [SHALL] be logged in the centralized reposit

nodes.label: 1 All test results [SHALL] be logged in the centralized repository.
nodes.full_text: 1 All test results [SHALL] be logged in the centralized repository.

nodes.label: 2 The QA team [SHOULD] conduct audits every milestone.
